'''sasoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mna|mna]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-s-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mna|mna]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sasoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæsereth|sæsereth]] || [[word:sæserej|sæserej]] || [[word:sæseresh|sæseresh]] || [[word:sæsere|sæsere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sasosoroth|sasosoroth]] || [[word:sasosoroj|sasosoroj]] || [[word:sasosorosh|sasosorosh]] || [[word:sasosoro|sasosoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sasoroth|sasoroth]] || [[word:sasoroj|sasoroj]] || [[word:sasorosh|sasorosh]] || [[word:sasoro|sasoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sasofroth|sasofroth]] || [[word:sasofroj|sasofroj]] || [[word:sasofrosh|sasofrosh]] || [[word:sasofrof|sasofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sasorotho|sasorotho]] || [[word:sasorojo|sasorojo]] || [[word:sasorosho|sasorosho]] || [[word:sasoroko|sasoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sasoroth|sasoroth]] || [[word:sasoroj|sasoroj]] || [[word:sasorosh|sasorosh]] || [[word:sasoro|sasoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sasorothol|sasorothol]] || [[word:sasorojol|sasorojol]] || [[word:sasoroshol|sasoroshol]] || [[word:sasorokol|sasorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sasorothotho|sasorothotho]] || [[word:sasorojojo|sasorojojo]] || [[word:sasoroshosho|sasoroshosho]] || [[word:sasoroko|sasoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sasorothon|sasorothon]] || [[word:sasorojon|sasorojon]] || [[word:sasoroshon|sasoroshon]] || [[word:sasorokon|sasorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sasorothoro|sasorothoro]] || [[word:sasorojoro|sasorojoro]] || [[word:sasoroshoro|sasoroshoro]] || [[word:sasorokoro|sasorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
